card.name: ULIX TURNER
card.title: HOGFATHER

abilities.name: Corn-Fed
abilities.text: When an ally within 6" is dealt damage, this model may discard a card. If it does so, reduce the damage dealt to the target by 2.

abilities.name: Lost in the Slop
abilities.text: After this model suffers damage from an enemy attack action, it may drain a (c). If it does so, the attacker is dealt 2 damage and gains an Adversary token.

actions.name: Wrangler's Wallop
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This attack has a raise value of 3.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Conjecture
triggers.text: Once per activation. Choose a suit. Target may discard a card of the chosen suit. If they do not, this model draws two cards.

actions.name: Hog-Tie Takedown
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target friendly models.
actions.effects: Place this model into base contact with the target. Then, if the target is an enemy model, it gains Adversary and Slow tokens.

triggers.name: Overhead Slam
triggers.text: Move the target 6" in a straight line. If this movement is interrupted, deal 2 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Covered in Slop
triggers.text: An enemy model within 2" of the target gains an Adversary token.

triggers.name: Fattened Up
triggers.text: Once per activation. Target gains a Glutted token.

extraction_notes: The 'Sooey' characteristic appears after 'Living' in the characteristics list
Health bar shows numbered pips from 1 to 14

hallucination_flags: Merge warning: Title mismatch: front='HOGFATHER' back='Hogfather'
